//: Item catalog (HS-3, high_school_person_layer.md §5). Content, not schema: Player_Items.item_id is NOT an FK — GameManager validates every owned row against this file loudly at load. Entry contract (§5.1): id (stable, never reused), name (player-facing copy lives here, not C#), category (Transport/Clothing/Jewelry/Food/Gear), price (against Players.funds), modifiers (passive STATUS-stat buffs only — attractiveness/social_status/reputation, per-stat aggregate capped at ItemBuffCap=+15, computed at read never persisted), transport_hours_saved (Transport only; highest owned wins, §5.3), autobuy_min_tier (wealth tier at/above which parents may auto-gift, §3.2). The three creation transport gifts (commuter_bike/used_sedan/new_coupe) are a CONTRACT with BackstoryGenerator.BackstoryProfile.TransportGiftByTier — renaming any of them breaks avatar creation's gift row; both harnesses pin them. used_sedan is the design doc's own §5.1 worked example, kept verbatim. Food entries carry no passive modifiers by design (§5.1: consumable flavor, happiness/need nudges arrive as events in HS-4/5, never a standing passive). Gear here is lifestyle gear — baseball gear quality stays in Player_Equipment. All prices/modifiers are first-pass tunable content.
